response.justification: Strong technical background with 15+ years of software development experience across diverse stacks, solid Linux/open-source affinity (DLang, node.js, GIS platform), and demonstrated initiative through founding GISCollective and teaching workshops. However, the role requires C1 German proficiency and the candidate only has Basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German consulting context. Also lacks explicit formal team leadership/management experience and UML proficiency is not mentioned.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and Linux/open-source ecosystems
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates architectural ownership and open-source commitment
Strong craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and mentoring through teaching
concerns: German proficiency only Basic — far below required C1 for client advisory role
No explicit team lead/management track record; titles are individual contributor (Senior/Staff Engineer)
UML, requirements management, and IT security/compliance experience not evidenced on resume
